description_for_human: Search and summarize openFDA drug safety and labeling data.
description_for_model: Use this plugin for openFDA label, safety, recall, and enforcement retrieval when the user asks about regulatory signals, labels, or adverse event trends.

functions.name: search_openfda_labels
functions.description: Search openFDA drug labeling data for product indications, warnings, and dosage sections.

product_name.description: Drug, biologic, or device product name.

limit.description: Maximum number of label records to return.

returns.description: Structured response from the remote MCP server.

functions.name: get_openfda_adverse_events
functions.description: Retrieve adverse event summaries and signal trends from openFDA for a product or ingredient.

product_name.description: Drug, biologic, or device product name.

limit.description: Maximum number of event summaries to return.

returns.description: Structured response from the remote MCP server.

functions.name: get_openfda_recalls
functions.description: Retrieve recall or enforcement data from openFDA based on product or classification.

returns.description: Structured response from the remote MCP server.

tools.name: search_openfda_labels

limit.description: Maximum number of label records to return.
